1.content:
So let's start our story.

For the beginning pick one of the characters:
1.title: The Beginning

11.content:
So.. we will go with Mike Johnson.

As said before he is a 16 years old boy.
Mike is a bit small for his age and only 5"2 tall (1,57 m). He is member of a soccer team and befriend with two neighbor boys Lucas and Fred.
Also he has got a girlfriend called Sally, but until now it's a secret and his parents have no clue.


We start at a pretty normal day.
It's holiday time and Mike had no chores for today. His father was at work and his mother would go to the book-store in about an hour. Mike didn't know where Samantha was but surely she would be with one of her friends.
Mike sits in his room to consider what to do today.
11.title: Mike Johnson

choices: find a spot no one would hide in
111.content:
Mike grabbed his phone and wrote his friends "What's upp? Shall we meet and play some games or something?"
It doesn't take long for them to answer "yeah let's have some fun." and "Fine with me, let's meet up"

A few messages later they had arranged everything and after his mother left the house both of his friends arrived.
They had a fun time playing some games on playstation but after a while Fred came up with a new idea.
"Let's play another game, something in the real world."

Mike asked "Whats in your mind?"

Fred smiled and answered "I've seen something on youtube. A hide and seek chellange. They went into stores or something and hide there, if they won't be found they will win money. How about we participate on one of that chellanges? I've heard they are looking for participants."

Lucas was at first not that enthusiastic but after Fred had explained everything, especially how much money you could possibly win, he wants to give it a try. Mike was alike. But he suggested to test their abilities to hide and to train it before they would possibly participate at one of those chellanges.

So the friends start to play hide and seek at the Johnsons house. Fred was the first one to seek.
Mike and Lucas went hiding themselves somewhere in the house.

Fred found both of them pretty fast. So did Mike.

"I believe we are not that good at hiding.. aren't we?" Mike said and his friends nod.
"How about we hide you Mike, guess Fred and I can fix you up a hiding space or something, you have the best chances to hide successfully" Lucas suggested.
"Well, guess you're right, I'm pretty small and flexible, but who would try to find me if both of you help hiding me somewhere?"
"Good question," Fred answered "how about your Mum? She will return in a short while and if we would be able to hide you beneath her nose I guess that would be a pretty good prove that we could hide you perfectly."

It took a while but Mike said yes and they searched for the perfect hiding spot.
111.title: meet with Lucas and Fred

1111.content:
"Okay, let's find a place no one would hide in. I guess we will find something hmm.." Fred said.
"Why don't we try to see how small you can make yourself Mike? This way we could anticipate better where to fit you in or something like that." Lucas suggested.

Said and done, Mike rolls his body into a ball and both, Fred and Lucas where surprised how tiny he could be.
"Wow man.. that's .. awesome" Fred announced.
"Looks like you would fit inside my school-bag, that's crazy." Lucas added.
"I don't think a bag would be a good hiding place Lucas, someone would see me move. It's not that easy to stay like this and don't move, you know." Mike replies.

There was a solution for that.. an unpleasant one.
They came up with a stupid idea. Wrap Mike with Duck tape, so he wouldn't have a chance to move and would be disguised in some way or another.

After a few minutes there was a duck tape wrapped Mike lying on the floor in front of his friends. They had made sure that he could breath but moving was impossible now.
Lucas grabbed his smartphone and took a picture "Man that looks strange, as if we hat made a really big soccer ball wrapped in duck tape. I can't recognize you Mike. Well I can't even imagine that strange ball could be a human." Fred agreed laughing "That worked out great."
Mike kept quiet. He was not sure if that was really a good thing. He couldn't move and was trapped in this position. His friends now could do to him whatever they want.

Fred and Lucas discussed a while what to do with you and Fred grabbed you and lifted you from the floor into his arms "Wow Mike you're lighter then I thought, I could easily carry you around and I'm not that strong"
"Let's carry him downstairs and find a spot to hide Mike."
And so they did.
1111.title: find a spot no one would hide in

choices: throw THAT into the trashbag and then into the garbage-can
place him inside a trashbag while looking for a better place
11111.content:
"How about we find a spot to hide him inside the kitchen. His Mum would be there to prepare dinner. If she can't find him it would be a total success." Lucas suggested and Fred agreed.
So they carried the strange ball-like thing called their friend into the kitchen and looked around to find the right place to hide him.

"We could place him inside a cupboard, he would fit inside easily." Fred looked inside one of the cupboards.
"True, but it would be suspicious to find .. well.. something like THAT." both giggled.
Meanwhile Lucas spotted the roll of trashbags Mike father had bought some days before.
HeavyDuty - will swallow all your garbage and will never rip apart! New! with fresh lemon fragrance
"Hm.. I've got an idea"
11111.title: kitchen

choices: close the can and leave him inside for now
okay, let's find another place to hide you.
111111.content:
Well THAT was for sure Mike, bound and wrapped with tape to a ball-like something.
"Wow wow.. wait! I don't want to be in a trashbag" he protested.

"Did you hear something?" Fred asked Lucas who declined "Nope, nothing. Let's hurry up and put THAT into the trash.

Mike was set down inside of one of those trashbags and they smelled pretty much like lemon. Then the bag was lifted from the floor and carried somewhere else, he couldn't see a thing. A small door opened, then something else, then some rustle? After that he felt that he was lowered into something.

Fred and Lucas opened the garbage can and emptied it before they put the new trashbag into it. they were surprised to see that it fits. Mike slid down to the bottom inside and with the bag he was in. Now there was even enough space on top of him for the former ingredients of the trashcan.

Mike could get a glimpse of light and see the faces of his two friends staring down on him. Lucas took another picture.
"C'mon guys.. enough fun.. get me out of here." Mike complains
His friends had a good laugh on him.
"Okay okay.. You're right Mike. we will get you out. Just one more thing to do before. Nobody would ever find you that way" and with that he emptied the trashbag, which was inside the can before they replaced it, on top of Mike.
All kinds of kitchen garbage fell on poor Mike. It had a strong odor and felt disgusting. Now he was really part of that trash it seems. he was lucky that there was a small gab and he was able to breath and to see the outside world.
"Perfect" Fred exclaimed and Lucas took another picture. "Eww you stink.. but now you're perfectly hidden. What now? get him out?"
111111.title: throw THAT into the trashbag and then into the ...

choices: have fun." and the boys have to leave for now
well I hope you throw him into the trash as well" she jokes
1111112.content:
"Okay, we had our fun and I'm pretty sure we were successful. No one would find Mike." Fred said and Lucas nodded "I think so, and I took pictures so Mike could see that in person after we get him out of the trash"

Right in that moment the door opened and Samantha entered the kitchen "Oh.. Hey guys, didn't know you were here today. where is Mike?"

Surprised by the sudden appearance of Mike's sister Fred and Lucas tried to act as everything was normal.
"Ah, Hi Samantha. Yea we visited Mike today." Fred said and closed the garbage-can "We.. hm.."
Lucas added "We just helped Mike to clean up his room and are about to leave."

Samantha was a bit surprised. Usually Mike was not enthusiastic when it came to cleaning his room. "Okay..
1111112.title: Samantha walks into the kitchen

choices: tell her the truth (but she did not believe it)
tell her it's just some old strange helloween deco
11114.content:
Just the moment Lucas opened the door there was Samantha standing in front of him. It looked like she wanted to knock on Mike's door. "Wow hey hi Samantha."

Samantha was surprised she just wanted to ask Mike a question and get his help. "Oh I didn't know you were visiting, hi Lucas oh and Fred too." then she saw the strange thing Fred was carrying but didn't recognize it was her brother Mike. "What the heck is that strange ball and why is it wrapped in duck-tape?"

"What? ah you mean that ball." Fred did some quick thinking to came up with a story.
11114.title: interrupted by his sister Samantha

choices: climp out of the window onto a tall trashcan and escape unseen
no escape possible just hide for now
112.content:
brrr brrr Mikes Phone vibrates. There was a massage from Sally. "Hi Mike, I'll visit you after your Mum left for work. Ok?"

For sure that was okay, that was amazing. Mike was more then happy that his lovely girlfriend would visit him. He quickly cleaned up his room and hid the bag of trash under his bed. On first glimpse his room looked perfect.
Soon his mother left the house and Sally arrived.
She is a little bit shorter then Mike and really slender.

You can imagine what a young couple alone at home does. Let's say they had a nice day.

When they hear Mike's mother return from work Sally had to leave, so nobody would find out that they were a couple.
112.title: Sally wants to visit him

choices: Mike had to help and need to throw away the trash
Megan went outside to throw to bags inside the trashcan
Samantha wants to throw away her trash
1121.content:
Sally was used to climb out of Mike's window. It was no big deal because under the window were the big trash-cans his family had.
Well usually they were closed but this time the lid stands open.
Sally was hurrying and didn't check if everything was as usual so she climbed out of the window blow Mike a kiss and let herself down.
To her big surprise she did not land on top of the bin instead she falls inside, hid her head on the edge and was knocked unconscious. After her the lid fell close.

For now nobody knows she was inside that trashcan.
1121.title: climp out of the window onto a tall trashcan an...

info.brief_description: A story where you or someone else ends up in a trashcan (mostly unknown).
info.description:
I Never tried to write a story about trashcans and that sort of stuff..

This will become an interactive story where the maincharacter or someone related to him/her will end up in the trash and be accidently and mostly unknown disposed.

We will start with a fictive family:

Family Johnson

Father Donald Johnson is a hard working man. He is 46 years old and works for a construction busines.
His wife is 42 years old and called Megan. She works part-time at a book-store.
Then we've got the children. Mike is 16 years old and his sister Samantha 19 years old.

The Johnsons are living in a suburb of a major city. They have a beautiful and clean neighborhood with many families living in their own houses.
They are befriend with some of the families and ocassionly visit each other and have small parties.
